overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a character walking through a misty nighttime landscape. The character traverses open grassland with scattered lamp posts, enters a rocky canyon corridor, and emerges to discover a searchable object near a distant settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland meadow with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through open grassland, passing a lit lamp post on the right

entered.detail: expansive open field with tall brown grass stretching into the misty distance
sparse bare trees silhouetted against the dark blue night sky
tall iron lamp post with warm yellow lantern light illuminating the path
low-lying fog hovering over the distant meadow creating atmospheric haze
narrow worn trail through the grass showing the character's route

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open grassland meadow at night, passing a warm lamp post on the right. The landscape is misty and atmospheric with scattered bare trees silhouetted against the dark blue sky.

events.description: large rocky outcrop emerges on the left, partially enclosing the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path with a rocky wall now flanking the left side

entered.detail: large dark rock formation rising beside the path creating a natural wall
tall evergreen trees visible in the middle distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The path becomes more enclosed as a large rocky outcrop rises on the left. The character walks alongside this natural wall while pine trees become visible in the distance ahead, and the previous lamp post falls behind.

events.description: entering deeper shadow of rocky canyon, ambient light decreases significantly

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow rocky passage with walls on both sides, approaching a distant lamp light

entered.detail: narrow passage between tall rock walls creating a canyon-like enclosure
dark stone wall on the right side closing in on the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky canyon corridor where the ambient light drops significantly. Tall rock walls flank both sides of the path, and a distant lamp post becomes visible ahead at the corridor's exit.

events.description: exits rocky canyon into open area revealing distant settlement lights
approaches wooden crate with SEARCH interaction prompt visible

agents.ego_description: emerging from the canyon and approaching a searchable object near a lamp post, observing distant lights

entered.detail: wooden crate or barrier with game interaction prompt, searchable object
warm yellow lights from buildings visible in the far distance indicating a settlement
cluster of illuminated windows and street lights from a distant village or camp

segments.scene_description: The character exits the rocky canyon into an open meadow where distant settlement lights become visible on the horizon. The character approaches a wooden crate with a SEARCH prompt near a lamp post, suggesting an interactive game element.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty nighttime landscape that transitions from an open meadow into a restrictive rocky corridor before emerging into a distant settlement. It begins in a wide grassland meadow under a dark blue sky, passing a warm lamp post and silhouetted bare trees. As the character moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed with a large rocky outcrop rising on the left and pine trees appearing in the distance. The scene then shifts into a narrow rocky canyon where the ambient light drops significantly between tall walls, before the camera follows the path toward a glimmering lamp post at the exit. Finally, the landscape opens back into a meadow where the character approaches a searchable wooden crate with settlement lights glowing on the horizon.
